description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test CUDA that runs on a labeled pull request or manually triggered. Use an nvidia job with a CUDA 12.2.0-devel-ubuntu22.04 container that tests Python and C++ on CUDA. The workflow checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.11, installs MPI, CMake, and other dependencies, and runs various tests including pytest and a script test_cc_local.sh.
